trainset_generating: Training data is being generated, please wait
trainset_already_ready: Training set is already ready, no need to regenerate
trainset_not_ready: Training set is not ready, please generate training data first
trainset_in_use: Training set is in use and cannot be deleted
trainset_generation_failed: Training data generation failed, please check app configuration and dataset settings
task_already_running: This app already has a running training task
task_cannot_retry: Task status does not allow retry
task_cannot_cancel: Task status does not allow cancellation
task_app_not_found: Application not found or has been deleted
task_app_not_found_suggestion: Please check if the application still exists, or select a different application
task_model_not_found_suggestion: Please configure a Rerank model in the app workflow's dataset search node
eval_dataset_not_generated: Evaluation dataset has not been generated yet, please wait for training task to complete
eval_results_not_found: Evaluation results not found, please ensure training task has completed the evaluation stage
validation_sft_bridge_unaccessible: SFT Bridge service is not accessible
validation_sft_bridge_unaccessible_sugge: Please check if SFT Bridge service is running and ensure network connection is normal. Verify that the SFT_BRIDGE_BASE_URL environment variable is correctly configured
validation_diting_unaccessible_suggestio: Please check if DiTing service is running and ensure network connection is normal. Verify that the DITING_BASE_URL environment variable is correctly configured
validation_dataset_no_synthesis_index_su: Please ensure that the associated datasets have completed synthesis index generation. You can check the index generation status in dataset settings
validation_no_dataset_configured_suggest: Please configure at least one dataset in the app workflow's dataset search node, and ensure that the dataset contains synthesis indexes
prepare_trainset_deleted: Trainset not found or has been deleted
prepare_trainset_deleted_suggestion: Please check if the trainset ID is correct
prepare_data_empty: No training data available in trainset
prepare_data_empty_suggestion: Please ensure the trainset contains training data
prepare_generation_failed_suggestion: Please check trainset generation logs and retry
prepare_timeout_suggestion: Trainset generation is taking longer than expected, please check the trainset status or contact administrator
prepare_file_system_error: Failed to prepare training data file
prepare_file_system_error_suggestion: This may be a file system permission issue. Please check system logs and available disk space
prepare_data_empty_after_write: Training data is empty, cannot start training
prepare_data_empty_after_write_suggestio: Please generate training data or manually add training samples first
finetune_data_path_not_found: Training dataset file path not found from preparation stage
finetune_data_path_not_found_suggestion: Please check if data preparation stage completed correctly, or re-run the training task
finetune_model_config_invalid: Base model endpoint configuration missing model field
finetune_model_config_invalid_suggestion: Please check the Rerank model configuration in the app and ensure model is properly configured
finetune_data_file_not_found: Failed to read training data file
finetune_data_file_not_found_suggestion: Training data file may have been deleted or is inaccessible. Please re-run the training task
finetune_sft_bridge_create_failed: Failed to create SFT Bridge training task
finetune_sft_bridge_create_failed_sugges: Please check SFT Bridge configuration (SFT_BRIDGE_API_ENDPOINT and SFT_BRIDGE_API_TOKEN) and ensure the service is accessible
finetune_cancelled_suggestion: You have cancelled this training task. To continue training, please click retry
finetune_deployment_failed: SFT Bridge task completed but model endpoint information not returned
finetune_deployment_failed_suggestion: Please check SFT Bridge service configuration, or contact system administrator
finetune_training_failed_suggestion: Please check if training data format is correct, or check SFT Bridge service logs for detailed error information
finetune_timeout_suggestion: Training may require more time, please adjust timeout configuration via environment variables SFT_BRIDGE_MAX_POLLS and SFT_BRIDGE_POLL_INTERVAL, or check SFT Bridge service status
finetune_deployment_no_endpoint: SFT Bridge task completed but model endpoint information is unavailable
finetune_deployment_no_endpoint_suggesti: Please contact system administrator to check SFT Bridge service configuration
register_endpoint_not_found: Tuned model endpoint information not found from finetuning stage
register_endpoint_not_found_suggestion: Please check if finetuning stage completed correctly, or re-run the training task
register_base_model_not_found: Base model config ID not found
register_base_model_not_found_suggestion: Please check training task configuration and ensure base model is correctly selected
register_ai_proxy_failed: Failed to register tuned model configuration
register_ai_proxy_failed_suggestion: Please check AI Proxy configuration (AIPROXY_API_ENDPOINT and AIPROXY_API_TOKEN) and ensure the service is accessible
register_channel_not_available: AI Proxy channel did not become available within timeout period
register_channel_not_available_suggestio: Please check if the model service is running properly and ensure the AI Proxy channel is correctly configured. You may retry the training task
eval_app_deleted: Application not found or has been deleted
